objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=45)
- adx(period=11)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: close crosses donchian.middle or adx.adx < 15
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 4.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (4.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the Donchian channel with ADX and ATR indicators can provide a robust breakout strategy by identifying potential trend changes and setting appropriate stop-loss and take-profit levels.
